# test_learnings.txt — craft-co-backend
# Generated by onboarding. Authority: overrides constitution defaults for this repo.

## Stack
- Node 22 / TypeScript / Express 5 / Prisma 7 / PostgreSQL 16
- Playbook: C.1 (Node + TypeScript + Express + Prisma + PostgreSQL)

## Build

### npm install
- No committed package-lock.json (it is gitignored). Dockerfile uses `npm i --ignore-scripts`.
- `--ignore-scripts` suppresses `postinstall: prisma generate` hook (expected — schema not present at install time).

### Prisma 7
- Prisma version: ^7.8.0. Uses `@prisma/adapter-pg` driver adapter.
- `prisma.config.ts` configures datasource URL from env and migrations path to `prisma/migrations`.
- Generator in `schema.prisma` uses default `provider = "prisma-client-js"` (no custom output path).
- `npx prisma generate` runs after `COPY . .`, before `npm run build` — canonical C.1 order.
- `npx prisma migrate deploy` runs at container start via `MIGRATE_CMD` in entrypoint.

### Initial migration
- `prisma/migrations/` was gitignored and absent. Created `prisma/migrations/0001_init/migration.sql`
  with full DDL derived from `schema.prisma`. Removed `/prisma/migrations/` from `.gitignore`.
- `migration_lock.toml` added at `prisma/migrations/migration_lock.toml` (provider: postgresql).

## Port
- App defaulted to port 4000. Fixed fallback in `src/index.ts` to `6713`.
- `ENV PORT=6713` set in Dockerfile; `process.env.PORT` is read before the fallback.

## Dependencies
- PostgreSQL: routed through toxiproxy:5432 → postgres:5432.
- Resend email: SDK no-ops when `RESEND_API_KEY` is unset (explicit `if (!resend) return` guard).
  The Resend SDK constructor does not expose a base-URL option without modifying application
  business logic (the `new Resend(key)` call) — marked `provisioner: none` in dependencies.json.
  Test generation must not author email-sending assertions that require a live/mock Resend endpoint.

## Infra
- Toxiproxy built (not mounted) per §4.2/§5.1a — bakes toxiproxy.json into the image.
- WireMock directory scaffolded with .gitkeep files; no active stubs needed (no HTTP API mocks).
- No .dockerignore present; build context includes all files.
